a soft oval face, medium-large calm eyes, a delicate jawline, a gentle quiet expression, soft oval face shape, medium-sized eyes, neutral eye tilt, soft but defined jawline, subtle cheek fullness, medium-high nose bridge, soft fuller lips, light natural brows, real skin texture with very mild imperfections, realistic attractive appearance, balanced facial symmetry, clear natural skin, well-kept but not influencer-like, quiet romantic but mature mood.

long, natural black, soft straight hair, no bangs, light natural makeup, neat campus everyday fashion, neat regular fit, campus-appropriate and modest. Outfit: muted rose blouse with a light cardigan.

Composition:
head-and-shoulders portrait, face clearly visible, looking near the camera with a natural relaxed expression, simple warm off-white or campus-neutral background, not a studio portrait.

soft natural daylight, realistic smartphone camera photo, 35mm equivalent lens, slight depth of field, natural skin texture, highly realistic but casual.
